t.div: No site coverage data available for today.

tr.td: Draft Not yet sent to client

div.div: Add your AI provider API key to unlock 10 intelligent features and the global AI assistant.
Ask anything · Navigate anywhere · Act with confirmation · session(s) logged

t.div: 10 AI Features — click to navigate to where each feature lives

button.div: Scans payslip attendance for AWOL patterns, unusual hours, and missing checkouts.
Rates each guard LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL from 90 days of operational history.
Cross-checks invoice lines against actual attendance — catches overbilling before clients do.
Ranks optimal guard assignments for unassigned slots based on scores and fairness.
Instantly ranks the best available replacement guards when a post becomes vacant.
Recommends proportionate disciplinary consequences using progressive discipline principles.
Flags CRITICAL roster gaps before leave is approved — not after.
Drafts a professional document renewal notice addressed to the guard — one click.
Generates a formal quarterly review across 4 dimensions from 90 days of data.
Translates payslip line items into plain language — reduces guard pay disputes.
